title: Codebase Validation
description: Validation result from /validate-plan. Each arch.json component is annotated with reuse status, matched files, and confidence scores.

components.description: One entry per component from arch.json, annotated with codebase validation results

status.description: create: no match found. reuse: exact match. adjust: match needs modifications. conflict: match is incompatible.

matches.description: Existing codebase types that match this component. Sorted by match_confidence descending (high → medium → low). Empty for 'create' status.

file.description: Path to the matched source file

type_name.description: Name of the existing type in the file

existing_interfaces.description: Protocols the existing type already conforms to. Empty array for data models.

existing_fields.description: Field declarations found in the existing type (e.g., 'id: String'). Empty array for non-model types.

match_confidence.description: How closely the existing type matches the architect's component

differences.description: Specific differences between the existing type and the arch.json component. E.g., 'field name: String? vs expected name: String', 'missing protocol conformance to ProductReading', 'responsibility is caching, arch expects fetching'. Empty array for reuse matches.

satisfied_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria (verbatim from arch.json) that the existing code already satisfies. Empty array if none.

unsatisfied_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria (verbatim from arch.json) that the existing code does NOT satisfy — gaps the synthesizer needs to address. Empty array if none.
